title: Sub Items Status to Change a Item Status with a Condition

posts.author: jenbo (Jen Boland)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to create another condition with this pre-built template automation.

"When all subitems of an item have a “subitem status” of Done, change the item’s “Column” to Completed

I only want to the item’s column to change if that subitem has a certain status. The pre-built template doesn’t seem to offer the + sign to add another condition.

posts.author: Mindflows_Shanine (Shanine Velarde)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Jen,

Shanine here from Mindflows! Since this is a custom automation, it can be achieved through Make.com/Zapier.

Hope this helps!
